steps.title: Identify what f(x) represents
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 200,000(1.21)^x$ gives the company's predicted annual revenue (in dollars). The variable $x$ represents years after the company started, and $f(x)$ represents the predicted annual revenue at that time. Therefore, $f(5)$ is the predicted annual revenue at $x = 5$ years.

steps.title: Interpret the statement and match to a choice
steps.content: When we're told $f(5)$ is approximately equal to $518,748$, this means the predicted annual revenue at 5 years is approximately $518,748$ dollars. That matches choice A — A is correct.
